Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}The mysterious readings seem to be coming from this door.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_000_0_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Could this be the door[n]Elizabeth was talking about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}I sense Shadows beyond the door as well. If you plan on entering, please proceed with caution.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Okay! Please go ahead and open the door.[n]{f 1 1}
